heading: Find your training path
body: Take a quick assessment to discover your ideal Hyrax program. We'll ask about your fitness background, goals, and preferences, then build a plan that fits your life. It only takes about 2 minutes. No commitment, no credit card required.
classFormatBody: Run a 45 minute Hyrax class with a short bask warmup, one scramble block, one haul block, and a bolt finisher.
eventCardBody: Host a branded Hyrax event at your gym or find a competition near you. Get in touch to get started.
